entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'Good — this is the existing manifest in the rawrxd repo (separate from the q8-wire project). The file I created (enterprise_license.h) is much more comprehensive with 55+ features vs the original 8. The user's open file is a good reference but our new system supersedes it.

Now let me verify the complete integration by reviewing what we've built:

Executed command in terminal
All 10 new files are in place. Now let me render the complete audit and architecture diagram:


Summarized conversation history

Here's the complete audit of the Enterprise License System across all 3 phases:

Created Files (11 total)
File	Purpose	Status
include/enterprise_license.h	Core header: 4 tiers, 55+ features, macros	Created
src/enterprise_license.cpp	Key creation, signing, manifest, audit	Created
src/license_creator.cpp	CLI key generator/validator	Created
src/win32app/feature_registry_panel.h	Win32 UI panel header	Created
src/win32app/feature_registry_panel.cpp	Feature matrix display panel	Created
include/dual_engine_inference.h	Phase 1: 800B Dual-Engine header	Created
src/dual_engine_inference.cpp	Phase 1: Enterprise-gated stub	Created
include/feature_flags_runtime.h	Phase 2: Runtime flag system header	Created
src/feature_flags_runtime.cpp	Phase 2: 4-layer toggle system	Created
include/license_enforcement.h	Phase 3: Enforcement gate header	Created
src/license_enforcement.cpp	Phase 3: Subsystem gates + audit trail	Created
Modified Files (4 total)
File	Changes
CMakeLists.txt	Added all 5 source files to Win32IDE target; added RawrXD-LicenseCreator target
Win32IDE.h	Added includes, License sidebar view, panel member, init/show/hide methods
Win32IDE.cpp	Added initEnterpriseLicense() call + implementations
config.example.json	Added "license" config section

Phases complete: Phase 1 (800B Dual-Engine stub), Phase 2 (Runtime Feature Flags), Phase 3 (License Enforcement Gate)
Implemented features: ~35 of 55+ (64%)
Wired to enforcement: ~20 of 55+ (36%)

Key gaps: CUDA/HIP backends, Flash Attention, Speculative Decoding, all 8 Sovereign features, GPTQ/AWQ quantization
Build target: RawrXD-LicenseCreator (CLI) + features integrated into RawrXD-Win32IDE
Next step: Run cmake --build to verify compilation, then wire enforcement gates into actual subsystem entry points'

Chat Edit: '800B Dual-Engine: locked (requires Enterprise license)

Create the license creator for all the enterprise features and make sure they are all wired or at least displayed for now so I/we can keep up with that  Please audit further and fully examine and detail what is missing verse what is there as well and do the top 3 phases also '
